summary: End-to-end testing of BRHC landing page. Backend (8/8 pytest) and frontend (all critical flows) passed. Contact and newsletter persistence verified. Newsletter idempotency confirmed. UI flows: hero render, stats, section order, projects filters, project modal (open/close-X/close-outside), contact form (validation + success + form clear), newsletter submit, navbar smooth-scroll, mobile menu toggle - all working.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is small and clean; uses uuid string IDs, isoformat for datetime persistence, _id excluded from queries. Pydantic validation OK.
Newsletter idempotency correctly returns the existing record; no duplicates created.
Projects filter uses AnimatePresence; UI count snapshots taken under 1s may include exit-animating cards (cosmetic, not a real bug).
Footer + Contact use process.env.REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL correctly via ${API}/contact and ${API}/newsletter.
All interactive elements have data-testid attributes.
No hard-coded URLs/credentials. CORS configured via env.
seed_data_creation: Test records created in MongoDB collections contact_submissions and newsletter_subscribers with TEST_ prefixed emails for traceability (left in place for manual inspection).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend pytest at /app/backend/tests/test_api.py runs in ~5s. Frontend Playwright covered hero, stats, section order, project filters (use >=1500ms wait between filter clicks because of framer-motion exit animation), modal close (X + outside-click), contact form validation/submit, newsletter submit, navbar smooth scroll (desktop), mobile menu toggle. Routes are /api/contact and /api/newsletter (POST + GET each).
